title: Man dies in storm near Athens as Saharan dust shrouds Crete
summary_full: Several regions are flooded in mainland Greece, while a Saharan dust storm envelopes the island of Crete.
summary_public: Several regions are flooded in mainland Greece, while a Saharan dust storm envelopes the island of Crete.
